reviews.comment:
No abundan las estaciones de servicio por esta zona. Recomiendo ir de noche, ya que por la mañana se llenan mucho.
Tenia que salir a la ruta temprano, hice una fila de 4/5 autos y cuando llegó el momento de acceder al surtidor, me dijeron que volviera en una hora porque iban a recibir al camión que descarga el combustible y cerraron toda la playa.
Lo único bueno, es que me dejaron limpiar el parabrisas.

(Translated by Google)
There aren't many gas stations in this area. I recommend going at night, as they get very crowded in the morning.
I had to hit the road early, so I got in a line of four or five cars, and when it was time to get to the pump, they told me to come back in an hour because they were going to receive the fuel truck, and they closed the entire lot.
The only good thing was that they let me clean my windshield.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2NXBiOEhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Leeeentos para atender. Había cola de gente para cargar nafta y en una sala había dos operarios mirando la larga cola, mientras solo uno atendía. El equipo para cargar aire en las ruedas estaba roto... Lo único rescatable que se podía pagar con la app de YPF

(Translated by Google)
Slow to serve. There was a line of people waiting to fill up with gas, and in one room, there were two workers watching the long line, while only one was serving. The tire inflation equipment was broken... The only redeeming feature was that you could pay with the YPF app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2c0xHVVhBEAE
